articles.title: Swedish court delays judgement in Klarna unit's antitrust case against Google.
articles.desc: A Swedish court has postponed delivery of its judgement in an $8.3 billion antitrust case brought by Klarna subsidiary PriceRuner against Google.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley launches Bitcoin ETF
articles.desc: Morgan Stanley has become the first major Wall Street bank to launch a Bitcoin exchange traded fund.

articles.title: HSBC granted Hong Kong stablecoin issuer licence
articles.desc: HSBC has been granted a stablecoin issuer licence by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA).
